mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GROUP1 ( g_id, id, g_title, category, user_max, price, area, addr1, addr2, latitude, longitude, start_date, last_date, comment1, comment2, type ) VALUES ( group1_seq.nextval, 1, #{g_title}, #{category}, #{user_max}, #{price}, substr(#{addr1}, 6, 2), #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{last_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{comment1}, #{comment2}, #{type} )
mapper.select: SELECT g_id, g_title, category, user_max, price, area, comment2, type, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'FMMonth FMDD"일"') AS start_date FROM GROUP1 WHERE type=#{type}
mapper.update: UPDATE GROUP1 SET G_TITLE = #{g_title}, START_DATE = #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, LAST_DATE = #{last_date, jdbcType=DATE}, USER_MAX = #{user_max}, PRICE = #{price}, ADDR1 = #{addr1}, ADDR2 = #{addr2}, COMMENT1 = #{comment1}, COMMENT2 = #{comment2}, TYPE = #{type}, CATEGORY = #{category}, LATITUDE = #{latitude}, LONGITUDE = #{longitude} WHERE g_id = #{g_id}
